body:
_⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟡 Minor_ | _⚡ Quick win_

**Normalize the host value in the run entry.**

`antigravity` is not one of the documented host values for this log format (`claude-code` or `cursor`), so both the header and telemetry here violate the autoreview contract and may break downstream grouping.

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the
rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate.

In @.agents/skills/autoreview/OPERATIONS.local.md around lines 25 - 29, The host
value in the telemetry field of the 2026-06-16 antigravity:branch:issue-488 run
entry is set to "antigravity", which violates the autoreview contract that only
allows "claude-code" or "cursor" as documented host values. Replace the
host=antigravity value in the telemetry line with one of the documented host
values (either "claude-code" or "cursor") to ensure compliance with the log
format specification.
```

</details>
